name: How much does AI visibility website optimization cost?

mainEntity.name: How much does AI visibility website optimization cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: Costs depend on site size, page count, and whether you need strategy, implementation, or ongoing tracking. A basic optimization project may be limited to a few key pages, while larger programs include schema, content rewrites, audits, and monthly monitoring.
acceptedAnswer.description: Pricing depends on scope, but it usually increases with the number of pages, fixes, and tracking needs.

description: Pricing depends on scope, but it usually increases with the number of pages, fixes, and tracking needs.
